privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to construct a new 2D channel profile from a blank canvas. The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_profile.slvs, and the verifier strictly checks for dimensions of 40.0 (bottom width), 70.0 (top width), and 25.0 (height) in the saved file.
